title: [DISCONTINUED] It's About The Journey
description: A modpack focused on exploration, survival, creativity, and good times.
body:
> ### Surprise, surprise, I'm ditching this pack to make [a whole new one](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mc-sns), again

[![It's about the journey. (Modpack title)](https://iatj-modpack.github.io/res/modpack_title_4k.png)](https://iatj-modpack.github.io/)

----

(Includes a [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#3qXD7K))

***This modpack is optimized for controller support, with [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) built-in!***

***This pack should also be compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft), however it hasn't been thoroughly tested.***

This is a modpack focused on improving Minecraft while still managing to feel familiar.

From Eyes of Ender taking longer to craft, to Diamond and Netherite tools not having impossible durability, this modpack is meant to bring back the challenge of the older days of Minecraft and adding a few classic modded Minecraft twists, making what I would say is the most complete modded Minecraft experience, without straying too distant from vanilla!

----

# Q&A 

### Q: Can I use this as a base for my modpack?
A: No, however this pack isn't too difficult to recreate!

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?
A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: There's a bug, how can I report it?
A: Submit an issue on GitHub! [Click here to do that](https://github.com/kckarnige/iatj/labels), or check the "links" tab on Modrinth.
